title: Build a Newspaper Article
description: A styled newspaper article layout using typographic CSS properties. The page uses rem and em units for scalable font sizes, text-transform for uppercase headers, font-weight and font-style for the sub-headline, text-indent and line-height for body text readability, and ::first-letter to create a drop-cap effect on paragraphs.
objectives: Use html font-size as the rem base for scalable typography
Use font-family with Times New Roman for the newspaper name
Use text-transform: uppercase on name and author elements
Use ::first-letter to style the first character of paragraph text
Use em units for font-size and line-height relative to the parent

files.name: index.html
files.content:
Daily Chuckles

July 5, 2024

Breaking: Grandma Edna Saves Earth

Alien Invasion Foiled by Tech-Savvy Grandma's Wi-Fi Password

By Jane Doe

In an extraordinary twist of fate, Grandma Edna found herself at the forefront of a potential crisis when her clever Wi-Fi security measures unexpectedly thwarted an alien invasion. As alien spacecraft descended upon the town, panic spread until Grandma Edna calmly intervened, resetting her router with a cryptic passphrase known only to her.

The aliens, encountering unforeseen technological barriers, struggled to breach Grandma Edna's fortified network. Frustrated and bewildered, they eventually retreated to reassess their invasion strategy, leaving residents both relieved and amazed at Grandma Edna's resourcefulness.
